recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Reluctant Werewolf
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Mystery, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Shaggy is turned into a werewolf, and it's up to Scooby, Scrappy and Shaggy's girlfriend to help him win a race against other monsters, and become human again.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Pirates Ahoy!
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure
recommendations.overview: It's horror on the high seas when Scooby-Doo and the gang take a creepy cruise into one of the world's most mysterious places, the Bermuda Triangle! If Scooby, Shaggy and the gang can't solve this mystery, they may have to walk the plank.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo and the Ghoul School
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, TV Movie, Mystery, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Scooby, Shaggy and Scrappy are on their way to a Miss Grimwood's Finishing School for Girls, where they've been hired as gym teachers. Once there, however, they find that not only is it actually an all-girl school of famous monsters' daughters but th

recommendations.title: Scooby Goes Hollywood
recommendations.overview: Shaggy and Scooby-Doo quit their Saturday morning TV series in pursuit of Hollywood stardom.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and WWE: Curse of the Speed Demon
recommendations.overview: When Scooby and Mystery Inc. visit an off-road racing competition, it's not long before strange events start to occur. A mysterious phantom racer, known only as Inferno, is causing chaos and is determined to sabotage the race. It's up to Scooby-Doo,

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! Shaggy's Showdown
recommendations.overview: When the Scooby gang visits a dude ranch, they discover that it and the nearby town have been haunted by a ghostly cowboy, Dapper Jack, who fires real fire from his fire irons. The mystery only deepens when it’s discovered that the ghost is also the

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo on Zombie Island
recommendations.overview: After going their separate ways, Scooby-Doo, Shaggy, Velma, Daphne, and Fred reunite to investigate the ghost of Moonscar the pirate on a haunted bayou island, but it turns out the swashbuckler's spirit isn't the only creepy character on the island.

recommendations.title: Scoob!
recommendations.overview: In Scooby-Doo’s greatest adventure yet, see the never-before told story of how lifelong friends Scooby and Shaggy first met and how they joined forces with young detectives Fred, Velma, and Daphne to form the famous Mystery Inc. Now, with hundreds of

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Gourmet Ghost
recommendations.overview: The Scooby gang visits a culinary resort run by Fred's uncle, Bobby Flay. While enjoying the sights, a ghost attacks the guests and destroys the resort, leaving the gang to put a stop to its threat.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! and the Curse of the 13th Ghost
recommendations.overview: Mystery Inc. withdraws from solving crimes after botching a case. When Vincent Van Ghoul contacts the gang about an unfinished investigation from Daphne, Shaggy and Scooby's past, the gang springs into action to finish the job that involves catching
